plugins.name: In-Home Display
plugins.description: Real-time in-home display for TerraLync showing solar, battery, and grid power. Features dual display modes (Bento Grid and NEXUS Fluid) selectable via plugin settings.
plugins.author: TerraLync Team

plugins.name: Axle Energy VPP
plugins.description: Virtual Power Plant integration for Axle Energy - automatic battery export during grid events
plugins.author: TerraLync Team

plugins.name: Octopus Energy Tariff Optimiser
plugins.description: Links your Octopus Energy account to TerraLync for tariff-aware battery scheduling. Supports Intelligent Go, Agile, and Saving Session participation.
plugins.author: TerraLync Team
